scripts.check: npm run check:site && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.check:site: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/deploy.mjs && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check scripts/build-docs.mjs && npm run docs:build && node scripts/check-docs.mjs
